data.title: Microsoft Urges Trump To Avoid This Critical Mistake In Global AI Race, Cautions It Will 'Give China A Strategic Advantage'
data.description: Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT) has cautioned the Trump administration that the Biden-era 'AI Diffusion Rule', might inadvertently strengthen China's rapidly expanding AI sector.

data.title: Tim Cook's Apple Is Developing New Technology To Help Social Media Apps Determine If Users Are Under 16
data.description: Apple is working on an API to help social media apps identify users under 16 with parental consent, for concerns over under-aged users.

data.title: Elon Musk Calls On Retired Employees To Return To Work At FAA: 'There Is A Shortage Of Top Notch Air Traffic Controllers'
data.description: Billionaire and Department of Government Efficiency lead Elon Musk on Thursday called on retired air traffic controllers to return to work.

data.title: Bybit's Mega Ethereum Hack Sparks Hard Fork Divide—A Choice Between Preventing Kim Jong Un's Nuclear Ambitions And Blockchain Immutability?
data.description: The $1.4 billion Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) theft from cryptocurrency exchange Bybit has not only sent shockwaves through the market but also revived a long-standing contentious debate—implementing a hard fork to recover hacked funds.

data.title: MSTR Stock Falls Over 3% In Friday Pre-Market: What's Going On?
